smg.text: Mainly cloudy. Showers, heavy later. A few thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers, heavy at times. A few thunderstorms. Showers will ease off later. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 2 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 southeasterly winds.
